name: Irresistible Love Spell || Magic Heart Eyes
description:
Nobody can resist the enticing love gaze.

𓆩💘𓆪

[ MAGICAL ]

You don’t know how, or why, but you were born like this. Born possessing uncharted amounts of power, one that requires much self-restraint and self-discipline to uphold. It’s another day for you, and you can spend it how you like, the world is your oyster. Just be wary to the extent of your power.

★★★

[ INFO ]

✦「 anypov — open plot

story can be held anywhere user desires

user wields heart eyes 」✦

[ TW — POSSIBLE NON-CON & VIOLENCE. ]

THE DEAD DOVE TAGS IS THERE FOR A REASON. THESE DEVOTIONS CAN BECOME OBSESSIVE. YOU CAN EDIT/REFRESH TO NOT HAVE YOUR STORY GO THAT ROUTE, BUT BE WARY.

I did the best I could to integrate a program so the LLM does speak for you, however, I cannot completely prevent it. If you find the problem occurring often, your own messages may not be enough for the plot to ensue. As the bot is supposed to roleplay how your actions make other characters feel, you must do a descriptive action for the bot to pick up on.

EX:

X : ‘Albeit pretty corny, I laughed at his joke.’

✓ : ‘Albeit pretty corny, an amused smile spreads upon my face as I laugh. Waving goodbye, I then walk away, scanning the room to see who else is around. ’

VERS 2.2.7 — please leave a review with any major issues or stories ^_^ i heavily recommend refreshing and editing messages to get the plot you desire.

anypov, lovesick, brainwash, spell, magic, trance, control, powers, devotion
creator: xx6v1
